title: Architecture Diagram Schema
description: Intermediate representation for system architecture diagrams. LLM extracts structure from natural language into this format, then rendering pipeline generates HTML/SVG from it.

title.description: Diagram title, displayed as h1 at the top

subtitle.description: Optional subtitle shown below the title
examples: Browser Process coordinates multiple subprocesses via IPC

style.description: Visual style preset. Each style has its own template and design rules. Options: dark-professional (dark tech), hand-drawn (sketch/whiteboard), light-corporate (business/clean), cyberpunk-neon (neon glow/Catppuccin), blueprint (engineering/Nord), warm-cozy (friendly/Gruvbox).

format.description: Output format. HTML is the default (single-file with inline SVG and CSS). SVG outputs standalone SVG. Mermaid outputs Mermaid text syntax.

layers.description: Top-level architectural layers, rendered top-to-bottom. Each layer is a horizontal band containing modules.

connections.description: Connections between layers or modules. Rendered as arrows/lines between components.

groups.description: Boundary groups (VPC, security zone, region) that visually wrap multiple layers or modules.

legend.description: Legend entries shown below the diagram. Auto-generated from component types if not provided.

metadata.description: Optional metadata for the generated HTML page.

componentType.description: Semantic type that determines visual style (color, border, shape).

id.description: Unique identifier. Used as connection target and layout reference.

label.description: Display name shown on the layer header.

count.description: Whether this layer represents a single instance or multiple instances (shown with stacked cards effect).

description.description: Optional short description rendered inside the layer card.

children.description: Sub-modules inside this layer, rendered horizontally within the layer band.

id.description: Unique identifier within the entire diagram.

description.description: Optional annotation shown below the module name in smaller text.

tech.description: Technology tags displayed as small badges.

icon.description: Optional icon identifier from the icons catalog. Rendered inside the module box.

from.description: Source component id (layer or module). Must reference an existing id.

to.description: Target component id (layer or module). Must reference an existing id.

label.description: Label displayed on the connection line.

direction.description: Arrow direction. Bidirectional shows arrows on both ends.

style.description: Line style. Dashed typically used for async/optional connections.

label.description: Group label displayed on the boundary border.

type.description: Group type determines border style (dashed, colored, etc.).

children.description: Ids of layers or modules contained within this group.

color.description: Hex color for the legend swatch. Auto-derived from component type if omitted.

type.description: If provided, uses the predefined color for this component type.
